title: douglassia
intro: Douglassia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee family, native to South America. The medicinal properties of Douglassia include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Douglassia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Douglassia can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, fungal infections, and digestive issues.
